mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls above 150k signals strong labor market demand, boosting corporate earnings visibility and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in < 40% of triggered instances despite positive PAYEMS signals.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in industrial production above its 12-month moving average indicates robust supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO exceeds its 12m MA.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in housing starts below 1.1 million units signals weak consumer demand, prompting central bank policy accommodation and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST falls below 1.1 million.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in consumer spending (RSAFS) and GDP growth (GDPC1) signal recessionary risks, prompting fiscal stimulus and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where both RSAFS and GDPC1 decline.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI inflation reading below 2% indicates accommodative monetary policy expectations, reducing equity risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of instances where CPIAUCSL remains below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate below 4.5% signals tight labor markets, increasing wage pressures and corporate margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE remains below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous drop in consumer confidence (RSAFS) and rise in GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates divergent demand dynamics, creating sector rotation opportunities that generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS declines and GDPC1 rises.
